title_hint: AI Engineer Machine Learning Engineer Data Scientist
responsibilities: Design and implement production-ready AI/ML workflows.
Build and optimize model training and inference pipelines.
Collaborate with product and engineering for delivery milestones.
Monitor model quality and continuously improve accuracy.
Document architecture, assumptions, and operational runbooks.
must_have: Strong Python and applied ML fundamentals.
Hands-on experience with model deployment and monitoring.
Data preprocessing and feature engineering experience.
preferred: Experience with vector search or retrieval systems.

responsibilities: Own periodic reporting and performance tracking.
Analyze trends and provide actionable insights.
Improve process controls and operational efficiency.
Coordinate with cross-functional teams for execution.
must_have: Attention to detail and process discipline.

responsibilities: Manage end-to-end candidate lifecycle for assigned roles.
Coordinate hiring manager alignment and interview scheduling.
Maintain candidate communication and hiring funnel health.
Track hiring metrics and improve time-to-close.
Ensure compliant and consistent hiring process execution.
must_have: Ability to manage multiple open requisitions.
